hero_desc: Find top-rated barbers in seconds, or list your salon and let our software manage your schedule 24/7.
cf_title: Your Freshest Cut, Just 3 Taps Away.
cf_desc: Download the app and discover the easiest booking experience in Iraq.
cf_1_desc: See live availability and book instantly. No calls, no queues — just tap and go.
cf_2_desc: Know you're getting a great cut from top-rated professionals trusted by your community.
cf_3_desc: Get automatic push notifications and reminders so you never miss an appointment.
pf_title: Fill Your Chairs. End the Phone Calls.
pf_desc: Powerful tools to automate your shop and grow your clientele.
pf_1_desc: Prevent double-booking with real-time sync. Every slot, every barber — perfectly managed in one dashboard.
pf_2_desc: Set custom schedules, working hours, and service menus for every staff member in your shop.
pf_3_desc: Automated SMS reminders keep your chairs full and your revenue safe. Never lose a customer again.
pr_desc: Choose the plan that fits your business. Contact us on WhatsApp to subscribe.
pr_note: Message us on WhatsApp to get started
ts_1_quote: Easiest way to get a haircut! I just open the app, pick my barber, and I'm done. No more waiting for an hour.
ts_2_quote: KurdCut doubled my walk-ins! The calendar system saved us so much time and we never double-book anymore.
faq_users_a1: Yes! The KurdCut app is completely free for customers. Download it, create an account, and start booking instantly.
faq_users_q2: How do I book an appointment?
faq_users_a2: Open the app, search for barbers or salons near you, pick a time slot, and send a booking request. You'll get a confirmation right away.
faq_users_a3: Absolutely. You can cancel or reschedule directly in the app. We recommend doing so at least 2 hours before your appointment.
faq_users_a4: We're live in Erbil, Sulaimani, and Duhok, with more cities launching soon across Iraq.
faq_partners_q1: How do I list my shop?
faq_partners_a1: Message us on WhatsApp at +964 750 185 3167. We'll set up your account and guide you through the process.
faq_partners_q2: How do I pay for my subscription?
faq_partners_a2: Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange payment. We currently handle subscriptions manually to give you personal support.
faq_partners_q3: Can I manage multiple staff members?
faq_partners_a3: Yes! The Pro Salon plan supports up to 5 staff members with individual schedules and service menus.
faq_partners_a4: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all plans so you can test every feature risk-free.
dl_desc: Available on iOS and Android. Start booking your next grooming experience today.
ft_cta_desc: Join hundreds of businesses already thriving on KurdCut.
ft_slogan: The premium booking standard for Iraq.
